INST1SEQ:
This test examines your ability to compare two patterns, presented one after the other. The computer will present two patterns of dots to you. You should try hard to remember the first pattern. After a short time on the screen, it will be erased, and a second pattern will be displayed. You must decide if the second pattern is the same as or different from the first. Use the SAME response key if you think they match, and the DIFFERENT response key if you think they differ. Give your answer as quickly as you can without making mistakes.

Press any key to begin
DEBRIEF: Thank you for participating. Press any key to continue.
